vulnerabilities.title: OS Command Injection in node-opencv
vulnerabilities.description: utils/find-opencv.js in node-opencv (aka OpenCV bindings for Node.js) prior to 6.1.0 is vulnerable to Command Injection. It does not validate user input allowing attackers to execute arbitrary commands.

vulnerabilities.title: Command Injection in opencv
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `opencv`prior to 6.1.0 are vulnerable to Command Injection. The utils/ script find-opencv.js does not validate user input allowing attackers to execute arbitrary commands.


## Recommendation

Upgrade to version 6.1.0.
